stemHtml: Aircraft operating under VFR over routes navigated by reference to visual landmarks require radio-communication equipment that, under normal radio-propagation conditions, allows communication with…

options.a: rescue and other services likely to be required in the case of an emergency.
options.b: the operating base, for flight watch purposes.
options.c: ATC from any point in controlled airspace within which flights are intended.
options.d: appropriate ATC stations from all points outside controlled airspace.
